title: Savory Fluffy Slovakian Sugar Snap Peas Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish with a twist, featuring sugar snap peas and a dairy-free friendly option, perfect for a midnight craving. These fluffy dumplings are cooked to perfection in a tandoor oven.

ingredients.name: non-dairy milk
ingredients.notes: such as almond or soy milk

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, potato starch, and salt.
Add the melted vegan butter, non-dairy milk, egg replacement, black pepper, and dried dill weed to the bowl.
Mix the ingredients until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Place a few sugar snap peas in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the peas to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Place the dumplings in the preheated tandoor oven and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until they are fluffy and lightly browned.
